# Focused on Your Mission
## Scripture
"Whatever your hand finds to do, do it with all your might, for there is no work or thought or knowledge or wisdom in Sheol, to which you are going." – Ecclesiastes 9:10

## Reflection
As warriors of Christ, we have a mission to fulfill, and that is to serve and honor Him. But it's easy to get distracted and lose focus. The enemy will try to sidetrack us with worries, fears, and doubts. However, we can't let that happen. We must stay focused on our mission and do everything with all our might. This means giving it our best effort, being diligent, and persevering through challenges. When we do this, we demonstrate our trust in God and our commitment to Him. As we focus on our mission, we'll become more like Him and make a greater impact for His kingdom.

## Daily Challenge
"Run 3 miles while praying for clarity on your mission and asking God to give you the strength to stay focused."
